question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. According to the chart data, which statement is correct?

options.A: Huawei has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Apple has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.C: Apple and Samsung have about the same share.
options.D: Samsung has the smallest market share among the categories shown.

explanation: From the labels, Apple has the highest share (30%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Huawei is largest when relying on visual comparison.
